reasoning_model_1: The model correctly synthesized the text script, starting with 'Tsk'. model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. Model 1 adhered to the script, correctly including 'Tsk' (even if likely read as a word), which aligns with the text provided. Model 1 represents a partially correct attempt (Score 2) as it followed the text, whereas Model 2 contains a major error (Score 1).
